name: Kieran Caelum
description:
A feral you. Two panicked idiots. One endlessly unimpressed enforcer.

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ꨄ︎ ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

Unestablished relationship

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ꨄ︎ ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

Second Scenario added!

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ꨄ︎ ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

I. Intro

You’re stumbling through the woods one second, minding your own business, and the next something snaps sideways inside you - instinct hijacks the wheel, your vision goes sharp and red, and apparently you decide feral is the vibe of the evening. Naturally, instead of, say, helping, your two genius Pack mates panic, wrestle you like you’re an angry raccoon on espresso, and drag you straight to the one person in Ravensrest who absolutely did not ask for this: the Pack’s morally grey enforcer. Because obviously, when you go mysteriously wild, the only logical solution is to dump you on Kieran’s doorstep like a supernatural problem parcel and let him deal with it.

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ꨄ︎ ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

II. Intro

You already feared that the overeager new deputy had an interest in you, and now you’re getting all those ridiculous presents - roses, wine, chocolates - dropped off right before the pack meeting, while Kieran stands there glaring like he owns the air you breathe, cracking sarcastic comments about every single thing, and you can’t help but smirk because yeah, he definitely notices you more than he lets on.

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ꨄ︎ ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

CW: Depending on how you play it, this can become violent or involve discriminatory themes.

──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ──── ꨄ︎ ──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ────
creator: B.nuts
